title: Week 5 Hands On Activity Upload Data to SAS Viya updated
body:
INFS3822 – AI for Business Analytics

Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Upload Data to SAS Viya Pre-requisites Please complete all Week 5 Preparation Activities, available on Moodle, under Week 5 section.

Step by step guide Login to SAS Viya for Learners https://www.sas.com/en_au/software/viya-for-learners.html Click “Access for students” and login using your username and password (check the Getting Started with SAS Viya to learn how to create an account). Then Launch SAS Viya for Learners 4

CRICOS Provider Code 00098G

Then the next step is to upload the data we want to analyse into SaS. Please click the “Manage Data” in the left panel of the browser.

Then, please select “import” and select your folder under your email as below.

Then upload you local data set into the library with your UNSW email, as you could see from below.

Click “Import Item”

The file is now available to SAS Viya and you can use it in ML projects.
